posts.author: MichaelDieterman (Michael Dieterman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’ve created a few templates from boards. On the desktop app I can perfectly access them when creating a new board in a workspace. However, when I try to do the same from the mobile app I only get a list of other standard templates, but can’t access the template center at all. Am I missing something?

IMG_08441179×2556 219 KB
